item.title: ExxonMobil blasts critics of Texas relocation, automatic voting programme
item.description: US supermajor takes shots at ISS and Glass Lewis, which are telling shareholders to vote against the move

item.title: Brazil sets clock for next two oil and gas bid rounds
item.description: Brazil government to offer acreage in pre-salt and post-salt horizons

item.title: Lessons from Mexico's 'oil revolution' sound cautionary note for Venezuela
item.description: Promises of new opportunities coming to Venezuela echo the Mexican oil and gas revolution that never was

item.title: Subsea7 wins offshore deal for Norway gas export project
item.description: Contractor wins work for Vaar Energi and Equinor’s Goliat Gas Export effort in Barents Sea

item.title: On the right track: Eni makes big gas discovery in Egypt's Western Desert
item.description: Bostan-1X exploration well hit 400 feet of net pay

item.title: Lenders line up to finance Eni CCS projects
item.description: Italian major's CCS-focused satellite secured £500 million from leading banks

item.title: New UK North Sea oilfield due on stream imminently
item.description: Operator updates on Teal West and Greater Marigold projects

item.title: ExxonMobil signs deal to assess exporting Cypriot gas to Egypt
item.description: US supermajor, QatarEnergy and Cairo government sign MoU to assess viability of sending gas from Glaucus and Pegasus discoveries to North Africa nation

item.title: Kazakh project maintenance shutdown under review amid high prices
item.description: Maintenance shutdown at Kashagan offshore oilfield would remove 400,000 bpd of oil from international markets in June

item.title: Borr feeling good about prospects for enlarged fleet
item.description: Company has added 10 jack-ups to its fleet of top-tier shallow-water rigs

item.title: 'Stranded jewels': New player targets mature Nigeria assets after London listing
item.description: Coastal Africa also eyes Angola acquisitions and wants to establish an integrated engineering, procurement and construction business

item.title: Pauline Hanson reveals Norway-inspired oil and gas policy for Australia
item.description: One Nation's proposal would see commonwealth government take up 30% equity in new projects

item.title: Santos lauds 'milestone' for flagship CCS development
item.description: Santos is also progressing concept development for the second phase of its Moomba CCS project

item.title: PV Drilling to supply jack-up drilling rig to Russian player
item.description: Unit will be deployed at Thien Nga-Hai Au field offshore Vietnam

item.title: At least seven contenders in chase for strategic Middle East project
item.description: Oman's OQ envisages developing NGL extraction facilities at Saih Nihayda with transportation to Duqm, where the gas liquids will be fractionated and stored for export

item.title: High oil and gas prices to cost global economy up to $2 trillion, ETC warns
item.description: Asia at crosshairs of energy security dilemma with ETC making case for long-term transition to alternative energy sources

item.title: Russia says understanding reached with China on gas pipeline project
item.description: China has yet to disclose details of the Sila Sibiri 2 pipeline project

item.title: Yinson opens first office in China
item.description: The floater specialist has been cooperating with Chinese shipyards for years

item.title: This week's leading oil and gas appointments
ExxonMobil close to deal to return to Venezuela: report
item.description: US supermajor first sent team to South American nation in March to explore its vast oil resources

item.title: Offshore driller names Halliburton chief to its board of directors
item.description: Jeff Miller tapped to fill open spot on Noble Corporation’s board

item.title: Questions remain over destination for Greater Sunrise gas flows
item.description: No decision whether gas will be delivered to Timor-Leste or Australia despite historic 2025 cooperation agreement

item.title: Eni lands new long-term supply contracts for Indonesian LNG
item.description: The company sees the deals as the first of many that will strengthen its position in global liquefied natural gas market

item.title: ExxonMobil awards completions contract for work offshore Nigeria
item.description: ExxonMobil picks Weatherford for deepwater efforts in African country

item.title: McDermott to share refinancing plan update in 'near term'
item.description: The contractor's accrued liabilities during the first quarter of 2026 stood at $1.824 billion

item.title: Petrobras and Saipem sign deal for decommissioning offshore Brazil
item.description: One-year agreement to define framework for technical and operational collaboration between companies

item.title: Petrobras revives Albacora production with ‘vintage FPSO’
item.description: Brazilian oil company also tendering for new FPSO for Campos basin field

item.title: Iran’s new Persian Gulf Authority draws lines of control around Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Tehran claims holding sway over a wide area from its own shores to UAE ports of Fujairah and Umm Al Quwain

item.title: EU has got methane rules wrong, says Equinor
item.description: Equinor exports around 120 billion cubic metres per year of gas to Europe

item.title: UK to curb judicial reviews that stall giant wind farm projects
item.description: Government set to restrict use of key legal weapon used against major renewable energy and grid projects
